heroHeadline: BREAKING: JNIM & FLA Stage Largest Coordinated Assault Since 2012 — Kati Bombed, Defense Minister's Home Destroyed, FLA Claims Kidal
heroSubtitle: Simultaneous pre-dawn attacks hit Kati military base, Bamako airport, Sévaré, Gao and Kidal on April 25, 2026. JNIM and the Tuareg FLA coordinated without formal alliance. FLA claims most of Kidal; Defense Minister Sadio Camara's fate unknown after his residence was destroyed.
footerNote: Data sourced from ACLED, RFI, Le Monde, Crisis Group, UN OHCHR, HRW, SIPRI, AFP, Bloomberg, Al Jazeera, Reuters, and Institute for Economics & Peace. All figures approximate unless stated.
